svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD
 CustomerDB["[customer DB]"]
 Lake["[retold-databeacon[lake-postgres]: customer-X-database]"]
 OpDB["[retold-databeacon[opdb-mysql]: meadow schema]"]
 CachedViews["[retold-databeacon[lake-postgres]: customer-X-database, cached-view tables]"]
 Portal["[customer-portal: configurable dashboards]"]
 CustomerDB -->|clone job, dispatched by mapper, executed by meadow-integration| Lake
 Lake -->|lake → opdb mapping, defined in mapper UI, executed by meadow-integration| OpDB
 OpDB -->|opdb → cached-view operation, defined in mapper UI, typed Ext/Agg/Hist/Int| CachedViews
 CachedViews -->|read by pict-section-dashboard via mesh| Portal
","style":"notebook"}
